lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee aap pachhaaniaa raam naam paragaas |
lines.english: Follow the Guru's Teachings, and recognize your own self; the Divine Light of the Lord's Name shall shine within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵਡੇ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: sacho sach kamaavanaa vaddiaaee vadde paas |
lines.english: The true ones practice Truth; greatness rests in the Great Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh tis kaa sifat kare aradaas |
lines.english: Body, soul and all things belong to the Lord-praise Him, and offer your prayers to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਸੁਖੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad saalaahanaa sukhe sukh nivaas |
lines.english: Sing the Praises of the True Lord through the Word of His Shabad, and you shall abide in the peace of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਮਨੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam manai maeh bin naavai dhrig jeevaas |
lines.english: You may practice chanting, penance and austere self-discipline within your mind, but without the Name, life is useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਣਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee naau paaeeai manamukh mohi vinaas |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the Name is obtained, while the self-willed manmukh wastes away in emotional attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਤੇਰਾ ਤੂੰ ਸਭਸੁ ਦਾ ਤੂੰ ਸਭਨਾ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko teraa toon sabhas daa toon sabhanaa raas |
lines.english: All are Yours, and You belong to all. You are the wealth of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖੁ ਤੂੰ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਦਾਸੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau raakh toon naanak teraa daas |2|
lines.english: Please protect me, by the Pleasure of Your Will. Nanak is Your slave. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਹਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਇਕਨਾ ਦੂਰਿ ਹੈ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis toon dehi tis sabh kichh milai ikanaa door hai paas |
lines.english: Those, unto whom You give, receive everything. You are far away from some, and You are close to others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਤੁਧੈ ਪਾਸਹੁ ਮੰਗਦੇ ਨਿਤ ਕਰਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh tudhai paasahu mangade nit kar aradaas |
lines.english: Everyone begs from You, and all offer prayers to You each day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਤੁਧੈ ਨੋ ਸਾਲਾਹਦੇ ਦਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਨੋ ਪਰਗਾਸਿ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: sabh tudhai no saalaahade dar guramukhaa no paragaas |9|
lines.english: All praise You, O Lord; at Your Door, the Gurmukhs are enlightened. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਥਾਉ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਪਾਸਹੁ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਮਨਿ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਕੋ ਨਿਰਜਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: tudh baajhahu thaau ko naahee jis paasahu mangeeai man vekhahu ko nirajaas |
lines.english: Without You, there is not even a place to stand begging. See this yourself and verify it in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤੁ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਉਚਾ ਕੂਕਦਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: panddit parr parr uchaa kookadaa maaeaa mohi piaar |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, read and read, and shout out loud, but they are attached to the love of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਨ ਚੀਨਈ ਮਨਿ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਗਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: antar braham na cheenee man moorakh gaavaar |
lines.english: They do not recognize God within themselves-they are so foolish and ignorant!

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਜਗਤੁ ਪਰਬੋਧਦਾ ਨਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae jagat parabodhadaa naa boojhai beechaar |
lines.english: In the love of duality, they try to teach the world, but they do not understand meditative contemplation.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: birathaa janam gavaaeaa mar jamai vaaro vaar |1|
lines.english: They lose their lives uselessly; they die, only to be re-born, over and over again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨੀ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਇਆ ਬੂਝਹੁ ਕਰਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinee satigur seviaa tinee naau paaeaa boojhahu kar beechaar |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru obtain the Name. Reflect on this and understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਚੂਕੈ ਕੂਕ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa saant sukh man vasai chookai kook pukaar |
lines.english: Eternal peace and joy abide in their minds; they abandon their cries and complaints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਨੋ ਆਪੁ ਖਾਇ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aapai no aap khaae man niramal hovai gurasabadee veechaar |
lines.english: Their identity consumes their identical identity, and their minds become pure by contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad rate se mukat hai har jeeo het piaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, attuned to the Shabad, they are liberated. They love their Beloved Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਫਲ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਵੈ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har kee sevaa safal hai guramukh paavai thaae |
lines.english: Service to the Lord is fruitful; through it, the Gurmukh is honored and approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis har bhaavai tis gur milai so har naam dhiaae |
lines.english: That person, with whom the Lord is pleased, meets with the Guru, and meditates on the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਪੁਛਹੁ ਵੇਦਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manahatth kinai na paaeo puchhahu vedaa jaae |
lines.english: Through stubborn-mindedness, none have found Him; go and consult the Vedas on this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਲਏ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak har kee sevaa so kare jis le har laae |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone serves the Lord, whom the Lord attaches to Himself. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਲਘਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee har paaeeai har paar laghaae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord is found. The Lord carries us across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਸੂਰਾ ਵਰੀਆਮੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਦੁਸਟੁ ਅਹੰਕਰਣੁ ਮਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naanak so sooraa vareeaam jin vichahu dusatt ahankaran maariaa |
lines.english: O Nanak, he is a brave warrior, who conquers and subdues his vicious inner ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਹੋਆ ਸਦਾ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਸਭੁ ਕੁਲੁ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aap hoaa sadaa mukat sabh kul nisataariaa |
lines.english: They themselves are liberated forever, and they save all their ancestors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam saalaeh janam savaariaa |
lines.english: Praising the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the Gurmukhs redeem their lives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਰਹਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਵਿਗਾੜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mareh ahankaar maran vigaarriaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs die in egotism-even their death is painfully ugly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਨਿ ਸਚਿ ਦੁਆਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sohan sach duaar naam piaariaa |
lines.english: Those who love the Naam look beauteous at the Gate of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bin naavai sabh dukh sukh visaariaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Name, everything is painful, and happiness is forgotten. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਹੁ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਗਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aapahu doojai lag khasam visaariaa |
lines.english: Attached to self-conceit and duality, they have forgotten their Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਵਿਚਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabho varatai hukam kiaa kareh vichaariaa |
lines.english: Everything happens according to the Lord's Will; what can the poor people do?

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਿੜਾਇਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai har naam dirraaeaa tin vichahu bharam chukaaeaa |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has implanted the Name of the Lord within me. It has dispelled my doubts from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਏਕ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar ek liv laagee antar naam vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Conquering my ego, I am lovingly focused on the One Lord; the Naam has come to dwell within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਗਾਈ ਕਰਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਮਗੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam har keerat gaaee kar chaanan mag dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: I sing the Lord's Name and the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises; the Divine Light shines, and now I see the Way.
